title: Migration lock wait amplified connection pressure
failure_mechanism: Database sessions accumulated while writes waited on a migration-related lock conflict, increasing connection pressure and slowing payment persistence without establishing that the connection pool itself was the primary failure.
mitigation_summary: Latency declined after the lock wait condition cleared and connection demand returned to baseline; this record does not establish a remediation path for current payment errors.
timeline_summary: The migration preceded a rise in lock waits, then write latency and active connections. Payment latency followed the database-side contention pattern.
narrative_safe: RelayOps payment writes slowed while a migration-related lock wait condition increased active database connections. A historical connection-pool precedent would be unsafe unless the lock-wait pattern is ruled out.
